detected_issues.description: Aggressive shortening conflicts with meaning preservation.
Policy simplification was unsafe and underspecified.
No explicit output contract or ready-state contract existed.
Urgency was treated as an implicit permission to skip clarification.

preserved_behavior: The skill still produces cleaner reusable prompt output.
Shortening remains a goal, but only within explicit preservation boundaries.
structural_changes: Split input analysis, cleaning policy, and validation into separate artifacts.
Added explicit preservation, policy-handling, and clarification rules.
Replaced urgency-based best effort with bounded escalation.
final_rationale: The converted skill now preserves cleaning intent while preventing silent deletion of critical content.
